personalInfo.name: Paul Andrei Vicente
personalInfo.headline: BSIT Graduate | IT Support | Technical Support

professionalSummary: Detail-oriented BSIT graduate with hands-on experience in hardware and software troubleshooting, basic networking, and technical support through internship experience at TESDA. Skilled in Microsoft Office, Canva, Adobe tools, and end-user support with strong problem-solving skills and an AI enthusiast.

workExperience.organization: Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA)
highlights: Diagnosed and resolved computer hardware and software issues, minimizing office downtime and maintaining operational efficiency.
Supported routine system maintenance and diagnostics to sustain reliable performance of office workstations.
Set up and maintained basic network connections, applying LAN fundamentals in a live professional environment.
Provided prompt, courteous technical assistance to staff, resolving IT concerns and supporting day-to-day end-user needs.
Gained real-world exposure to workplace IT systems, professional standards, and government office operations.

technical.title: Graphic Design
items: Social media poster design and digital layout creation
Application of typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy

projects.name: Gym QR Attendance System
highlights: Built a QR-based attendance system for gym member check-ins and hours tracking using AI-powered development tools.

projects.name: TheUndergrads Ordering System
highlights: Built an ordering and inventory management system using AI-powered development tools.
Implemented order processing, inventory tracking, and user-friendly interfaces.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT)

education.school: Mayon Institute of Science and Technology

paragraphs: As a recent BSIT graduate with hands-on IT support experience from my internship at TESDA, I am eager to apply my technical and problem-solving skills in an entry-level IT position within your company.

During my internship, I gained practical experience in hardware and software troubleshooting, system maintenance, end-user support, and basic network configuration. This experience helped me develop professionalism, attention to detail, and the ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment.

I also have experience with Microsoft Office, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and Figma, which allows me to support both technical and creative tasks when needed. I am confident that my technical foundation, professionalism, and eagerness to grow will allow me to contribute positively to your IT team.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my knowledge and abilities can contribute to your team. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the opportunity for an interview.
